name: tallymind-mcp-plugin
description: MCP plugin connecting TallyPrime to Claude via its HTTP/XML gateway, with diagnostics, GST tools, and guarded writes.

interface.shortDescription: Talk to TallyPrime in plain English from Claude.
interface.longDescription: Connects Claude to a local TallyPrime instance over its HTTP/XML gateway: connection diagnostics, ledgers/vouchers/reports/GST summaries with fuzzy name search, and guarded preview-then-confirm writes.
defaultPrompt: Using TallyMind, run tally_doctor and tell me if I'm connected.
Which clients have GST mismatches this quarter?
Show me overdue debtors past 90 days.
